title: 2025-12-05 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 17.84
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-12-05: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 17.84/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-12-05, the score printed 17.84/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
